name: Increase Nussinov gamma to reduce false positives
hypothesis: The low precision (0.2697) suggests over-pairing. Increasing the Nussinov gamma penalty will suppress spurious base pairs, improving precision and F1.
expected_effect: Precision increases, recall may drop slightly, but F1 improves due to better balance.

name: Enable pair residual with larger kernel
hypothesis: Pair residual connections with a larger kernel can capture longer-range dependencies, improving mid- and long-range F1 scores (currently 0.3103 and 0.2802).
expected_effect: Mid- and long-range F1 increase, overall F1 rises.

name: Increase pairrefine channels and blocks
hypothesis: More capacity in PairRefine (channels=32, blocks=3) will better model complex multi-stem structures (current F1=0.327) and fragmented stems (F1=0.09).
expected_effect: Improved recall and precision on multi-stem and fragmented structures, raising overall F1.

name: Tune learning rate and lambda_pair
hypothesis: Current learning rate may be suboptimal; a lower lr (0.0008) with higher lambda_pair (7.0) will focus training on pair prediction accuracy, reducing over-pairing and improving precision.
expected_effect: Precision increases, over-pairing decreases, sparse pairs F1 improves, overall F1 rises.
